items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 16, 2026, Order, UPC_CoA_54/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定：上诉期自一审附理由判决作出之日起算
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Appeal Period Starts Upon Issuance of Reasoned Decision
items.summary: The Court of Appeal of the Unified Patent Court addresses procedural matters concerning time limits in an appeal case between Belkin International Inc., Belkin B.V., Belkin Limited and Koninklijke Philips N.V. The case involves European Patent EP 2 867 997 and concerns the application of Article 77(1) of the UPCA and various Rules of Procedure.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Belkin诉飞利浦案中发布程序令，澄清《统一专利法院协议》第77(1)条及程序规则。法院裁定，上诉期限仅在一审法院发布附理由的判决书后才开始计算。理由是上诉人需依据判决理由根据程序规则制定救济请求。该裁决明确了上诉时效的起算节点，解决了此前关于期限计算的争议，为UPC诉讼程序提供了明确的法律确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal issued a procedural order in Belkin v. Philips, clarifying when the time limit for lodging an appeal begins. The Court held that under Article 77(1) of the UPCA and Rule 224.1(a) of the Rules of Procedure, the appeal period only starts once the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision. The judges reasoned that the grounds of the decision are indispensable for an appellant to formulate the remedy sought pursuant to Rule 225(e). This ruling resolves uncertainty regarding whether the clock starts upon the initial judgment or the subsequent reasoning.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需严格监控一审判决送达与理由公布的时间差。上诉倒计时并非从判决主文下达即刻启动，而是以完整理由书为准。建议建立专门流程跟踪UPC案件文书状态，避免因误判期限导致失权，同时利用此窗口期充分准备上诉策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision provides critical legal certainty for litigation teams managing UPC portfolios. By establishing that the appeal clock does not start until the full reasoned decision is available, the Court prevents premature expiration of appeal rights. Rights holders must adjust their internal case management workflows to track the specific date of the reasoned decision's issuance rather than relying solely on the initial judgment date to avoid procedural default.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉期限仅在一审法院发布附理由判决后开始计算", "判决理由对上诉人制定救济请求不可或缺", "明确适用UPCA第77(1)条及程序规则相关条款"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The appeal period under Article 77(1) UPCA begins only when the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision.", "Rule 224.1(a) RoP requires the availability of decision grounds for appellants to properly formulate their remedy.", "The Court of Appeal confirmed that grounds are indispensable for complying with Rule 225(e) RoP requirements."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格监控UPC一审判决理由书发布时间以确定上诉期", "利用期限起算规则优化上诉策略并避免程序失权"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensures parties have adequate time to review judicial reasoning before committing to appellate proceedings.", "Practice note: Update docketing systems to trigger appeal deadlines based on the issuance date of the reasoned decision.", "What to monitor: Future applications of this principle to ensure consistent interpretation across different divisions of the Court."]
core_points_en: The appeal period under Article 77(1) UPCA begins only when the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision.
Rule 224.1(a) RoP requires the availability of decision grounds for appellants to properly formulate their remedy.
The Court of Appeal confirmed that grounds are indispensable for complying with Rule 225(e) RoP requirements.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensures parties have adequate time to review judicial reasoning before committing to appellate proceedings.
Practice note: Update docketing systems to trigger appeal deadlines based on the issuance date of the reasoned decision.
What to monitor: Future applications of this principle to ensure consistent interpretation across different divisions of the Court.

items.title: HGF tech practice receives another boost with Barker Brettell partner
items.title_zh: HGF 吸纳前 Barker Brettell 合伙人强化技术团队
items.title_en: HGF Bolsters UK Tech Practice with Former Barker Brettell Partner Oliver Pooley
items.summary: UK and European patent attorney Oliver Pooley has joined HGF’s Birmingham office. He will bolster the firm’s tech and engineering team. Pooley has a degree in physics and chemistry and a PhD in electronic and electrical engineering. His technical specialties include electronics, AI, quantum computing, telecommunications, medical devices and additive manufacturing. Pooley began his career […] The post HGF tech practice receives another boost with Barker Brettell partner appeared first on JUVE Pat
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国及欧洲专利代理人 Oliver Pooley 从 Barker Brettell 加入 HGF 伯明翰办公室，旨在增强其技术与工程团队实力。Pooley 拥有物理化学学位及电子电气工程博士学位，专长涵盖电子、人工智能、量子计算、电信、医疗器械及增材制造等领域，此次变动体现了头部律所对前沿技术专利布局的重视。
items.ai_summary_en: UK and European patent attorney Oliver Pooley has joined HGF’s Birmingham office, bringing expertise from his previous role at Barker Brettell. Pooley holds a PhD in electronic and electrical engineering, alongside degrees in physics and chemistry. His technical focus areas include electronics, artificial intelligence, quantum computing, telecommunications, medical devices, and additive manufacturing. This appointment strengthens HGF’s technology and engineering capabilities in the Midlands, adding specialized capacity for complex high-tech patent matters across these emerging and established sectors.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This lateral move highlights the continued consolidation of specialized technical talent within major UK patent firms, particularly in high-demand sectors like AI and quantum computing. For rights holders managing portfolios in these fast-evolving fields, the availability of attorneys with deep academic and practical experience in specific hard technologies remains a critical factor in securing robust protection. Firms are actively reinforcing their regional offices with senior practitioners to meet client needs for technically sophisticated prosecution and advisory services.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["资深专利代理人 Pooley 加盟 HGF 伯明翰办公室", "新成员具备电子工程博士背景及多领域技术专长", "律所重点强化人工智能与量子计算等新兴技术板块"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Oliver Pooley joins HGF's Birmingham office from Barker Brettell to strengthen the firm's technology and engineering practice group.", "Pooley holds a PhD in electronic and electrical engineering with specific expertise in AI, quantum computing, and telecommunications.", "The hire expands HGF's technical coverage in advanced fields including medical devices and additive manufacturing within the UK market."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注律所技术团队背景以匹配高精尖专利需求", "借势专业人才流动优化在欧洲的知识产权布局"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders in AI and quantum sectors should verify that their chosen counsel possesses verified technical depth in these specific disciplines.", "Practice note: Regional hubs like Birmingham are becoming key centers for specialized tech patent work, offering alternative access to senior expertise.", "What to monitor: Further lateral movements of specialists in emerging technologies may signal shifting market capacities for complex patent prosecution."]
core_points_en: Oliver Pooley joins HGF's Birmingham office from Barker Brettell to strengthen the firm's technology and engineering practice group.
Pooley holds a PhD in electronic and electrical engineering with specific expertise in AI, quantum computing, and telecommunications.
The hire expands HGF's technical coverage in advanced fields including medical devices and additive manufacturing within the UK market.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders in AI and quantum sectors should verify that their chosen counsel possesses verified technical depth in these specific disciplines.
Practice note: Regional hubs like Birmingham are becoming key centers for specialized tech patent work, offering alternative access to senior expertise.
What to monitor: Further lateral movements of specialists in emerging technologies may signal shifting market capacities for complex patent prosecution.

items.title: Plasseraud IP celebrates 120 years of expertise in the service of innovation
items.title_zh: Plasseraud IP 庆祝成立 120 周年并宣布战略扩张
items.title_en: Plasseraud IP Marks 120 Years with Strategic Mergers and Amsterdam Expansion
items.summary: In 2026, Plasseraud IP celebrates 120 years of history, expertise and commitment to intellectual property. Founded in 1906, Plasseraud IP has been supporting those who innovate, create and transform the world for over a century. Written by .
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国老牌知产律所 Plasseraud IP 迎来 120 周年，宣布多项战略举措：合并 Bleger Rhein Poupon 以强化法国本土实力；开设阿姆斯特丹办公室拓展国际网络；整合法律团队成立 Plasseraud IP Avocats。此举旨在通过多学科专家团队，为全球创新者提供从专利到商标的一体化长期战略支持。
items.ai_summary_en: French intellectual property firm Plasseraud IP celebrates its 120th anniversary in 2026, marking over a century of service to innovators. The firm has recently executed significant structural developments, including a merger with Bleger Rhein Poupon to strengthen its French presence and the opening of an office in Amsterdam to consolidate international reach. Additionally, the integration of Plasseraud Avocats and Candé Blanchard Ducamp has formed Plasseraud IP Avocats, aiming to provide a more comprehensive approach to IP and legal advice for a diverse global client base.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The consolidation of specialized IP firms and expansion into key European jurisdictions like the Netherlands reflects a broader trend toward integrated service models. For rights holders managing portfolios across multiple EU member states, these developments signal increased availability of coordinated legal and technical support. Monitoring such structural changes helps clients identify partners capable of handling complex, multi-jurisdictional IP matters efficiently.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["合并 Bleger Rhein Poupon 巩固法国市场领先地位与服务深度", "新设阿姆斯特丹办公室以强化泛欧及国际业务覆盖能力", "整合律师团队实现知识产权与法律诉讼服务的全面一体化"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Merger with Bleger Rhein Poupon strengthens domestic expertise and market presence within France.", "Opening of Amsterdam office consolidates international network and enhances cross-border service capabilities.", "Integration of legal teams into Plasseraud IP Avocats enables a unified approach to IP strategy and litigation support."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借助律所法荷联动优势优化在欧洲的专利组合管理策略", "选择一体化服务团队以高效应对跨国知识产权纠纷与诉讼"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Integrated firms offer streamlined coordination for patent, trademark, and legal strategies across France and the Netherlands.", "Practice note: Evaluate whether merged entities provide seamless access to both technical IP experts and qualified legal counsel.", "What to monitor: Further consolidation trends among established European IP boutiques and their impact on service delivery models."]
core_points_en: Merger with Bleger Rhein Poupon strengthens domestic expertise and market presence within France.
Opening of Amsterdam office consolidates international network and enhances cross-border service capabilities.
Integration of legal teams into Plasseraud IP Avocats enables a unified approach to IP strategy and litigation support.

Practice note: Evaluate whether merged entities provide seamless access to both technical IP experts and qualified legal counsel.
What to monitor: Further consolidation trends among established European IP boutiques and their impact on service delivery models.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 14, 2026, Order On Suspensive Effect, UPC_CoA_48/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：UPCA第74条优先，可授予暂停执行效力
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Article 74 UPCA Prevails Over Rules, Allowing Suspensive Effect
items.summary: The Court of Appeal can grant suspensive effect to an order pursuant to R. 220.2 RoP as Art. 74 UPCA prevails over R. 223.5 RoP.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院在UPC_CoA_48/2026案中裁定，当《统一专利法院协定》(UPCA)与《程序规则》(RoP)冲突时，UPCA第74条优先，法院可依RoP 220.2条授予暂停执行效力。仅在“特殊情况”下（如命令明显错误、不可逆后果或基本程序权受损）才予批准。保证金通常被视为可逆，故难满足条件。申请人仅以中小企业身份主张无力支付保证金无效，需提供具体证据。此类裁定非最终决定，不涉及费用裁决。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CoA_48/2026, the Court of Appeal confirmed that Article 74 of the Unified Patent Court Agreement (UPCA) prevails over Rule 223.5 of the Rules of Procedure (RoP). Consequently, the Court may grant suspensive effect to orders under Rule 220.2 RoP in exceptional circumstances, such as manifest legal error or irreversible consequences. The Court rejected an appellant's claim of financial inability based solely on SME status, requiring specific evidence for security deposit exemptions. As this order is not a final decision concluding the action, no costs were awarded.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在UPC诉讼中若面临不利临时措施，申请暂停执行难度极大。需重点论证“不可逆后果”或“明显法律错误”，而非仅依赖财务困难。应提前准备详尽的财务证据以应对保证金要求，并密切关注UPC对程序规则的严格解释，避免程序性失误导致权益受损。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies the hierarchy between the UPCA and procedural rules regarding interim relief, establishing a high threshold for obtaining suspensive effect. For rights holders and defendants, it underscores that financial hardship arguments require rigorous substantiation beyond general corporate classifications. The decision also confirms that applications for suspensive effect are interlocutory in nature, meaning they do not trigger immediate cost decisions, which impacts litigation budgeting and strategic timing for appeals within the UPC system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPCA第74条优先于RoP 223.5，允许法院依RoP 220.2授予暂停执行效力", "暂停执行仅限特殊情况，如命令明显错误或造成不可逆后果，保证金通常可逆", "主张无力提供保证金需具体证据，仅引用中小企业身份不足；裁定不涉费用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 74 UPCA takes precedence over conflicting Rules of Procedure, enabling the Court of Appeal to grant suspensive effect under Rule 220.2 RoP.", "Suspensive effect requires exceptional circumstances like manifestly wrong orders or irreversible consequences; reversible security deposits generally do not qualify.", "Appellants must provide specific evidence of financial inability to pay security; referencing SME status alone is insufficient to meet the burden of proof."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["论证暂停执行需聚焦不可逆后果或明显错误，财务困难证明门槛极高", "应对保证金要求需提交具体财务证据，不能仅凭中小企业身份抗辩"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties seeking to halt enforcement pending appeal must demonstrate irreversible harm or clear legal error, as financial constraints alone rarely suffice.", "Practice note: When challenging security for costs orders, applicants should prepare detailed, specific financial documentation rather than relying on general business status clai…", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'exceptional circumstances' by the Court of Appeal, particularly regarding what constitutes irreversible consequences in patent disputes."]
core_points_en: Article 74 UPCA takes precedence over conflicting Rules of Procedure, enabling the Court of Appeal to grant suspensive effect under Rule 220.2 RoP.
Suspensive effect requires exceptional circumstances like manifestly wrong orders or irreversible consequences; reversible security deposits generally do not qualify.
Appellants must provide specific evidence of financial inability to pay security; referencing SME status alone is insufficient to meet the burden of proof.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties seeking to halt enforcement pending appeal must demonstrate irreversible harm or clear legal error, as financial constraints alone rarely suffice.
Practice note: When challenging security for costs orders, applicants should prepare detailed, specific financial documentation rather than relying on general business status clai…
What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'exceptional circumstances' by the Court of Appeal, particularly regarding what constitutes irreversible consequences in patent disputes.

items.title: UPC Court of Appeal: Accuracy of Ex Parte Applications
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉院：单方申请须确保事实披露准确完整
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Strict Duty of Full Disclosure in Ex Parte Applications
items.summary: In its March 2026 order in Ecovacs v Roborock, the Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order on the basis...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院在 Ecovacs 诉 Roborock 案中维持撤销单方检查令。法院认定申请人未遵守程序规则 192.3，未履行披露可能影响法院决定的重大事实义务。法院强调单方程序中申请人负有更高披露要求，申请时的遗漏或歪曲无法通过后续提交补救，事后补充理由不予采信，确立了严格的程序合规标准。
items.ai_summary_en: In its March 2026 order in Ecovacs v Roborock, the UPC Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order. The Court found that the applicant failed to comply with Rule 192.3 of the Rules of Procedure, which mandates the disclosure of any material fact that might influence the Court's decision. Emphasizing the heightened duty of candor in ex parte proceedings, the Court ruled that omissions or distorted accounts cannot be remedied by subsequent submissions. Facts introduced later are disregarded, confirming that initial applications must contain complete and accurate disclosure to survive judicial scrutiny.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 提起单方申请时，务必确保首次提交材料的完整性与真实性。任何关键事实的遗漏或表述不成都可能导致命令被撤销且无法挽回，需建立严格的内部合规审查机制以应对高标准程序要求。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces the critical importance of procedural rigor in UPC ex parte applications. Rights holders must ensure that initial filings provide a comprehensive and undistorted account of all relevant facts, as the Court will not accept post-hoc justifications. This strict approach protects the integrity of proceedings where the defendant is not initially heard, placing the burden squarely on the applicant to demonstrate full transparency from the outset.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单方申请必须全面、准确披露所有重大事实，否则命令将被撤销", "申请时的披露缺陷无法通过后续审查请求中的补充材料进行补救", "法院重申单方程序中申请人承担完全依赖其陈述的更高举证责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 192.3 RoP imposes a strict duty to disclose all material facts known to the applicant in ex parte proceedings.", "Omissions or distorted accounts in the initial application cannot be cured by later submissions or review requests.", "The Court disregards facts introduced after filing, requiring full accuracy at the moment the application is made."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["单方申请首份文件决定成败，严禁依赖事后补充来修补事实漏洞", "企业需强化内部事实核查流程，确保披露内容与主案陈述高度一致"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Applicants must verify that ex parte disclosures align fully with factual accounts in parallel main proceedings to avoid revocation.", "Practice note: Conduct rigorous internal fact-checking before filing to ensure no material facts are omitted or misrepresented.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions clarifying what constitutes 'material fact' under Rule 192.3 in complex technical disputes."]
core_points_en: Rule 192.3 RoP imposes a strict duty to disclose all material facts known to the applicant in ex parte proceedings.
Omissions or distorted accounts in the initial application cannot be cured by later submissions or review requests.
The Court disregards facts introduced after filing, requiring full accuracy at the moment the application is made.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Applicants must verify that ex parte disclosures align fully with factual accounts in parallel main proceedings to avoid revocation.
Practice note: Conduct rigorous internal fact-checking before filing to ensure no material facts are omitted or misrepresented.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions clarifying what constitutes 'material fact' under Rule 192.3 in complex technical disputes.

items.title: UPC and Partial‑Problems
items.title_zh: UPC 中央分院在钉子专利案中适用部分问题法
items.title_en: UPC Munich Applies EPO Partial-Problems Approach to Assess Inventive Step
items.summary: The partial-problems approach to inventive step is a well-known part of European patent practice, not least as it is used routinely by...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 中央分院（慕尼黑）在涉及 EP4019790 号钉子的诉讼中，首次适用“部分问题法”评估创造性。法院认定权利要求中的两个区别特征（钉尖角度与纵向凹槽）分别解决独立技术问题且无协同效应，属于简单叠加。因此，法院单独评估各特征创造性，最终因两者均显而易见而判定整体缺乏创造性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Central Division in Munich has applied the partial-problems approach to inventive step in case UPC_CFI_836/2024 concerning European patent EP4019790. The court evaluated a claim combining a specific nail-tip angle and longitudinal shaft grooves, determining these features addressed technically independent problems without functional synergy. Consequently, the court assessed each feature in isolation against prior art. Finding both elements independently obvious, the court held the claim lacked inventive step as a mere aggregation of features. This decision confirms that the UPC aligns with established EPO practice regarding combinations of non-interacting technical features.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请专利时，应避免将无协同效应的技术特征简单堆砌。面对 UPC 诉讼，需警惕对方利用“部分问题法”拆解组合发明，提前准备特征间协同效应的技术证据以抗辩无效风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling reinforces the alignment between UPC case law and EPO examination practice regarding the assessment of inventive step for feature combinations. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of demonstrating functional interaction or synergy between combined features to avoid classification as a mere aggregation. In litigation, challengers may leverage this approach to dissect complex claims into individually obvious components. Practitioners should ensure patent specifications explicitly articulate technical synergies to support unitary problem-solution arguments during validity proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 采纳 EPO 惯例，对无协同特征拆分评估创造性", "法院认定钉尖角度与凹槽解决不同阶段问题，无功能交互", "因特征均为简单叠加且各自显而易见，专利被判无效"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Central Division (Munich) applied the partial-problems approach to evaluate inventive step for a combination claim lacking synergistic interaction.", "Features addressing distinct technical phases were treated as an aggregation, allowing separate assessment of obviousness against prior art.", "The patent was invalidated because both distinguishing features were found independently obvious when evaluated in isolation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["避免无协同特征简单叠加，以防被拆分认定显而易见", "诉讼中需重点举证技术特征间的功能交互与协同效应"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders must demonstrate functional synergy between combined features to prevent claims from being treated as obvious aggregations under UPC jurisprudence.", "Practice note: Drafting strategies should emphasize technical interactions between features to counter potential partial-problems challenges during validity disputes.", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions applying the partial-problems approach to determine if strict separation of features becomes standard for multi-feature claims."]
core_points_en: The UPC Central Division (Munich) applied the partial-problems approach to evaluate inventive step for a combination claim lacking synergistic interaction.
Features addressing distinct technical phases were treated as an aggregation, allowing separate assessment of obviousness against prior art.
The patent was invalidated because both distinguishing features were found independently obvious when evaluated in isolation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must demonstrate functional synergy between combined features to prevent claims from being treated as obvious aggregations under UPC jurisprudence.
Practice note: Drafting strategies should emphasize technical interactions between features to counter potential partial-problems challenges during validity disputes.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions applying the partial-problems approach to determine if strict separation of features becomes standard for multi-feature claims.

items.title: UPC: Supplementing expert opinion after inspection not possible
items.title_zh: UPC 裁定：勘验后不得补充专家意见
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Denies Supplementary Expert Opinion After Evidence Preservation Inspection
items.summary: Van Loon had applied to inspect and preserve evidence at Inverquark’s exhibition stand in advance of a potential main action, which went...
items.ai_summary_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方法院在 Van Loon 诉 Inverquark 案中裁定，被告无权要求法院委托的专家在证据保全勘验后出具补充意见。法院指出，单方命令后的程序权利可通过复核申请保障，且该专家非规则 187 条定义的“法院专家”，无法律依据支持补充报告。实质准确性异议应在主诉讼中提出。
items.ai_summary_en: The Düsseldorf Local Division of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) denied a request by defendant Inverquark for a supplementary expert opinion following an ex-parte evidence preservation order granted to claimant Van Loon. The court held that there was no legal basis for such a supplement, as the appointed expert did not qualify as a 'court expert' under Rule 187 of the Rules of Procedure. The panel emphasized that evidence preservation aims to provide prompt information for assessing further action, with substantive accuracy challenges reserved for main proceedings. While procedural rights were protected via review options under Rule 197.3, the court noted specific technical questions regarding the expert's sketches and access to protective letters for potential reconsideration in future litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在面对 UPC 证据保全时，应重视保护信质量以预防勘验偏差。若对专家报告有异议，切勿试图在保全阶段要求补充，而应策略性地将技术事实争议保留至主诉讼阶段进行实质性抗辩。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the procedural boundaries of evidence preservation at the UPC, distinguishing it from full trial procedures where expert testimony is subject to party commentary. For rights holders and alleged infringers, it confirms that the primary function of preservation orders is rapid fact-finding, not final determination of technical infringement details. Parties should focus on securing robust protective letters to mitigate ex-parte risks and prepare comprehensive technical defenses for the main action, as the preservation stage offers limited avenues for correcting perceived inaccuracies in expert findings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院驳回被告要求专家出具补充意见的请求，认定缺乏法律依据", "证据保全旨在快速获取信息，实质争议应留待后续主诉讼解决", "被告对报告准确性的质疑虽被记录，但需在主程序中重新审议"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division ruled that defendants cannot request supplementary opinions from experts commissioned during ex-parte evidence preservation inspections.", "The court clarified that such experts are not 'court experts' under Rule 187 RoP, meaning parties lack the procedural right to comment on or challenge their reports at this stage.", "Substantive objections to the accuracy of detailed descriptions must be raised in subsequent main proceedings rather than during the preliminary evidence preservation phase."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["保护信是应对单方勘验的关键，需详尽描述技术特征以防误读", "针对专家报告的实质异议，应制定主诉讼阶段的详细抗辩策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can rely on the finality of preservation reports for initial case assessment, while defendants must accept that technical corrections are deferred…", "Practice note: Ensure protective letters comprehensively address potential technical misinterpretations, as post-inspection expert supplementation is procedurally unavailable unde…", "What to monitor: How UPC panels handle recorded technical discrepancies from preservation phases when evaluating evidence admissibility and weight in subsequent main actions."]
core_points_en: The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division ruled that defendants cannot request supplementary opinions from experts commissioned during ex-parte evidence preservation inspections.
The court clarified that such experts are not 'court experts' under Rule 187 RoP, meaning parties lack the procedural right to comment on or challenge their reports at this stage.
Substantive objections to the accuracy of detailed descriptions must be raised in subsequent main proceedings rather than during the preliminary evidence preservation phase.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can rely on the finality of preservation reports for initial case assessment, while defendants must accept that technical corrections are deferred…
Practice note: Ensure protective letters comprehensively address potential technical misinterpretations, as post-inspection expert supplementation is procedurally unavailable unde…
What to monitor: How UPC panels handle recorded technical discrepancies from preservation phases when evaluating evidence admissibility and weight in subsequent main actions.

items.title: Unified Patent Court Insights: Claim Construction
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院洞察：权利要求构建与功能性限定解释
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Clarifies Claim Construction: Functional Language Defines Suitability, Not System Components
items.summary: A recent decision from the Düsseldorf Local Division in UPC_CFI_351/2024 provides an interesting look at the Unified Patent Court's (UPC)...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫分部在 UPC_CFI_351/2024 号案件中，就打印机供粉容器的侵权纠纷作出裁决。核心争议在于“可安装”一词是否要求外部设备（打印机）实际存在。法院裁定，此类功能性语言仅定义产品适用性而非系统组成部分，确认单独销售容器构成对产品权利要求的直接侵权，厘清了产品claim与系统claim的界限。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CFI_351/2024, the Unified Patent Court's Düsseldorf Local Division addressed claim construction regarding a printer supply container. The dispute centered on whether the term 'detachably mountable' required the presence of an external apparatus (the printer) to constitute infringement, effectively arguing for a system claim interpretation. The Court rejected this view, ruling that such functional language defines the product's suitability for its intended use rather than mandating the physical presence of the receiving device. Consequently, the claim was interpreted as a product claim covering the container alone. The Court found that standalone toner bottles sold by the defendants directly infringed the patent, establishing a clear distinction between product and system claims in UPC jurisprudence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出口企业需注意，即便仅销售适配特定设备的配件，若功能描述符合专利限定，仍可能在欧盟面临直接侵权风险。建议在产品设计及说明书中审慎规避他人专利的功能性表述，并提前开展 FTO 分析。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies how the UPC interprets functional limitations in product claims, distinguishing them from system claims. For rights holders, it confirms that claims drafted with functional interfaces may still cover standalone components if they are suitable for the intended use. For potential infringers, it highlights that selling a single component compatible with a larger system may trigger direct infringement liability, even if the complementary system parts are not included in the sale. This approach aligns with traditional European patent practice but provides specific guidance for UPC litigation strategies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院裁定功能性限定词仅界定产品用途适应性，无需外部设备共存", "明确区分产品权利要求与系统权利要求，单独部件销售亦可侵权", "被告关于必须包含打印机组件才能实现发明的抗辩未被法院采纳"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court ruled that 'mountable' defines product suitability for intended use, not a requirement for the external apparatus to be present during infringement.", "Functional language like 'capable of supporting' does not convert a product claim into a system claim requiring multiple components to exist simultaneously.", "Standalone sale of a component designed to interface with another device can constitute direct infringement of a product claim under this interpretation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["功能性描述可能扩大保护范围，单独销售配件亦存直接侵权风险", "对欧出口硬件需严格排查专利权利要求，避免触碰功能性限定红线"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should consider drafting product claims with functional interface language to capture standalone component sales without needing to prove system-w…", "Practice note: Defendants arguing for system claim interpretations based on functional terms like 'mountable' face a high burden; courts may view these as defining suitability rat…", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' consistency in applying this 'suitability vs. presence' test to other functional claim terms in cross-border infringement disputes."]
core_points_en: The Court ruled that 'mountable' defines product suitability for intended use, not a requirement for the external apparatus to be present during infringement.
Functional language like 'capable of supporting' does not convert a product claim into a system claim requiring multiple components to exist simultaneously.
Standalone sale of a component designed to interface with another device can constitute direct infringement of a product claim under this interpretation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should consider drafting product claims with functional interface language to capture standalone component sales without needing to prove system-w…
Practice note: Defendants arguing for system claim interpretations based on functional terms like 'mountable' face a high burden; courts may view these as defining suitability rat…
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' consistency in applying this 'suitability vs. presence' test to other functional claim terms in cross-border infringement disputes.

items.title: UPC Orders Infringer to Publish Decision on their Website
items.title_zh: UPC 责令侵权方在其官网发布法院判决摘要
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Orders Infringer to Publish Judgment on Corporate Website
items.summary: A recent decision handed down by the Düsseldorf Local Division in UPC_CFI_351/2024 underscores the Unified Patent Court's authority to...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院在案件中裁定，被告利用官网误导公众其产品未侵权。依据 UPCA 第 80 条，法院除允许原告在行业期刊发布判决外，更责令被告在其官网首页发布判决主文一个月。此举旨在纠正被告制造的虚假印象，确保其约八千名客户获知侵权事实，彰显了 UPC 强制透明度的权威。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court's Düsseldorf Local Division exercised its authority under Article 80 of the UPCA in case UPC_CFI_351/2024. The Court ordered defendants to publish the operative part of an infringement judgment on their corporate website for one month. This measure addressed false public impressions created by the defendants' prior statements claiming non-infringement. The ruling complements permission granted to the claimant to publish the decision in industry journals, aiming to rectify market misconceptions among approximately 8,000 customers supplied by the infringing party.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应诉时需谨言慎行，避免在官网或公关稿中过早断言不侵权。若败诉，可能面临被强制在自有渠道公示判决的风险，这将严重损害商业信誉并波及现有客户群，需提前评估舆情应对方案。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights the UPC's willingness to use publication orders as a corrective tool against self-generated reputational damage during litigation. Rights holders should consider requesting such measures when opponents actively mislead the market about legal status. Conversely, companies facing proceedings must carefully manage public communications to avoid exacerbating liability or triggering mandatory transparency remedies that could impact commercial relationships.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院依据 UPCA 第 80 条行使裁量权，责令侵权方自费发布信息", "被告因在官网宣称产品合法而被判需在同一平台发布判决主文", "该救济措施旨在直接消除被告误导公众造成的错误市场认知"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Article 80 UPCA empowers the Court to order dissemination of decisions at the infringer's expense to correct misleading public narratives.", "Defendants were ordered to post the judgment's operative part on their own websites to directly counteract prior claims of product legality.", "The restorative measure ensures accurate information reaches the defendant's customer base regarding the confirmed patent infringement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["慎用企业官网发布涉诉产品合法性声明，以免败诉后遭反制", "需将“强制公示判决”纳入诉讼风险评估，制定危机公关预案"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Publication orders can significantly impact brand reputation and customer trust, making them a critical risk factor in enforcement strategies.", "Practice note: Monitor opponent's public statements regarding ongoing disputes; evidence of misleading claims strengthens requests for Article 80 corrective measures.", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions may adopt similar approaches, establishing a precedent for mandatory digital disclosure of adverse judgments."]
core_points_en: Article 80 UPCA empowers the Court to order dissemination of decisions at the infringer's expense to correct misleading public narratives.
Defendants were ordered to post the judgment's operative part on their own websites to directly counteract prior claims of product legality.
The restorative measure ensures accurate information reaches the defendant's customer base regarding the confirmed patent infringement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Publication orders can significantly impact brand reputation and customer trust, making them a critical risk factor in enforcement strategies.
Practice note: Monitor opponent's public statements regarding ongoing disputes; evidence of misleading claims strengthens requests for Article 80 corrective measures.
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions may adopt similar approaches, establishing a precedent for mandatory digital disclosure of adverse judgments.

items.title: Rolls-Royce tops UK’s most iconic British brands list, reveals UKIPO
items.title_zh: 劳斯莱斯领衔英国最具标志性品牌榜单
items.title_en: UKIPO Reveals Rolls-Royce as Top Iconic British Brand in 150th Anniversary Poll
items.summary: The luxury car brand is joined by the likes of Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini and the BBC, in a poll to celebrate the 150-year anniversary of trademark registration in the UK.
items.ai_summary_zh: 为庆祝英国商标注册制度建立 150 周年，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）公布了一项民意调查结果。豪华汽车品牌劳斯莱斯荣登“英国最具标志性品牌”榜首，与川宁、博柏利、Calpol、Mini 及英国广播公司（BBC）等知名品牌共同入选。该活动旨在回顾并彰显商标在英国商业历史与文化传承中的核心价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) has published a poll identifying the most iconic British brands to mark the 150th anniversary of trademark registration in the United Kingdom. Luxury car manufacturer Rolls-Royce topped the list, joining other long-standing entities such as Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC. This initiative highlights the historical significance of trademarks within the UK commercial landscape.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This publication underscores the enduring cultural and commercial value associated with long-established trademarks in the UK market. For rights holders, it serves as a reminder of the importance of maintaining brand heritage and public recognition over extended periods, which can contribute to overall brand equity and distinctiveness in a mature jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["劳斯莱斯获评英国最具标志性品牌第一名", "UKIPO 发布榜单庆祝商标注册 150 周年", "川宁、博柏利等经典品牌共同入选名单"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rolls-Royce was named the most iconic British brand in a UKIPO poll celebrating 150 years of trademark registration.", "Other notable brands included in the list are Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借鉴百年品牌建设经验，深化品牌文化内涵", "重视商标在英国市场的长期声誉积累与维护"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Long-standing brand recognition remains a key asset for trademark owners operating in the UK market.", "Practice note: Historical continuity and public perception are significant factors in assessing iconic brand status.", "What to monitor: Future UKIPO initiatives or reports regarding trademark history and brand valuation metrics."]
core_points_en: Rolls-Royce was named the most iconic British brand in a UKIPO poll celebrating 150 years of trademark registration.
Other notable brands included in the list are Twinings, Burberry, Calpol, Mini, and the BBC.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Long-standing brand recognition remains a key asset for trademark owners operating in the UK market.
Practice note: Historical continuity and public perception are significant factors in assessing iconic brand status.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO initiatives or reports regarding trademark history and brand valuation metrics.

items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解策略
items.title_en: Strategic Planning for Successful IP Mediation in the European Union
items.summary: Mediation is an increasingly attractive option to resolve IP disputes, especially for SMEs, individuals and universities. But it is important that organisations are well prepared and proactive, says Cyrille Rousseau of Dennemeyer & Associates.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，正成为解决知识产权纠纷的重要选项。重点介绍欧盟层面新机遇：欧盟知识产权局调解中心已于 2023 年启动并扩展服务；统一专利法院专利调解仲裁中心将于 2026 年启用。文章强调各方需充分准备并以诚意参与，以实现双赢并创造未来商机。
items.ai_summary_en: Mediation is emerging as a preferred alternative to litigation for resolving intellectual property disputes, particularly for SMEs, individuals, and universities. Cyrille Rousseau of Dennemeyer & Associates highlights that mediation offers speed, cost efficiency, confidentiality, and the potential for commercially focused, cross-jurisdictional solutions. The EU landscape is evolving with new dispute resolution forums: the EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its services in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs. Additionally, the Unified Patent Court's Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre is scheduled to open in June 2026, providing a dedicated platform for patent-related ADR in Europe.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks in Europe offers rights holders structured avenues for efficient dispute resolution outside of costly litigation. For portfolio managers and legal teams, integrating these mechanisms requires proactive preparation and a willingness to engage in good faith negotiations. Understanding the specific scopes of the EUIPO and upcoming UPC centers allows organizations to strategically select forums that align with their commercial objectives and jurisdictional needs.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["调解相比诉讼更具成本效益且能跨辖区解决关联冲突", "欧盟知识产权局已扩大调解服务范围至商标与设计争议", "统一专利法院将于 2026 年设立专门的专利调解仲裁中心"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Mediation provides quicker, confidential, and commercially oriented resolutions compared to traditional court litigation.", "The EUIPO Mediation Centre now covers all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.", "The UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre will launch in June 2026 to handle patent disputes."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用欧盟新设调解中心降低跨境维权成本与时间", "针对统一专利法院机制提前布局替代性争议解决策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers cost-effective and confidential alternatives to litigation for managing IP portfolios.", "Practice note: Organizations should prepare proactively and engage in good faith to maximize the benefits of mediated settlements.", "What to monitor: The operational launch of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026."]
core_points_en: Mediation provides quicker, confidential, and commercially oriented resolutions compared to traditional court litigation.
The EUIPO Mediation Centre now covers all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre will launch in June 2026 to handle patent disputes.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Institutional mediation offers cost-effective and confidential alternatives to litigation for managing IP portfolios.
Practice note: Organizations should prepare proactively and engage in good faith to maximize the benefits of mediated settlements.
What to monitor: The operational launch of the UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre in June 2026.

items.title: EU Pharma Package: The “Bolar” Exemption Compromise Proposal
items.title_zh: 欧盟制药一揽子计划：博拉尔豁免妥协提案分析
items.title_en: EU Pharma Package: Compromise Text Expands Bolar Exemption Scope and Explicitly Bans Patent Linkage
items.summary: In our sixth alert in this EU Pharma Package Series, we provided an analysis of the history and interpretation issues for another highly debated topic: the “Bolar” exemption.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析欧盟制药一揽子计划中备受争议的“博拉尔”豁免条款。该豁免允许仿制药企在专利期内进行上市前准备而不侵权。妥协文本扩大了物质和主体范围，涵盖定价、报销及第三方API供应商活动，但地域范围仍不明确。此外，提案明确禁止专利链接，旨在解决成员国间解释不一的问题，确保法律适用的统一性。
items.ai_summary_en: The latest compromise proposal for the EU Pharma Package significantly broadens the 'Bolar' exemption, which provides a safe harbor against patent and supplementary protection certificate (SPC) infringement for generic and biosimilar preparatory activities. The text expands both material and personal scope to include pricing, reimbursement, health technology assessments, tender participation, and activities by third-party active pharmaceutical ingredient suppliers. However, the territorial scope remains ambiguous. Additionally, the proposal explicitly prohibits patent linkage mechanisms, reinforcing the European Commission’s stance that such systems are anticompetitive. These changes aim to facilitate day-one market entry for generics post-patent expiry while addressing historical inconsistencies in Member State interpretations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国药企应密切关注豁免范围扩大带来的合规机遇，利用新规则优化上市前策略。同时，需警惕地域适用差异，加强内部合规审查，确保供应链活动符合目标国最新法规，规避潜在的专利侵权诉讼风险。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders and generic manufacturers, the expansion of the Bolar exemption alters the risk landscape for pre-expiry supply chain and regulatory preparations. The inclusion of tender participation and third-party suppliers creates new operational parameters that require careful contractual and compliance review. Simultaneously, the explicit ban on patent linkage removes a potential procedural barrier to generic entry in certain jurisdictions. Stakeholders must monitor how Member States transpose these expanded definitions, as divergent national implementations could reintroduce fragmentation despite the harmonization intent.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["扩大豁免范围至定价、报销及第三方API供应商，强化仿制药上市准备安全港", "明确禁止专利链接机制，消除欧盟内专利保护与市场准入挂钩的法律不确定性", "地域适用范围尚存模糊，需各成员国统一转化实施以避免碎片化执法风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The compromise text expands the Bolar exemption to cover pricing, reimbursement, health technology assessments, and tender participation activities.", "Third-party active pharmaceutical ingredient suppliers are now included within the personal scope of the Bolar exemption safe harbor provisions.", "Patent linkage is explicitly prohibited in the Pharma Package, aligning with existing EU competition law principles regarding market access."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用豁免扩围优化仿制药上市前合规策略，降低专利侵权风险", "关注成员国转化差异，加强供应链合规管理以应对潜在法律不确定性"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Generic and biosimilar companies should assess how the expanded scope impacts their pre-launch strategies, particularly regarding tender bids and supplier agreem…", "Practice note: Rights holders need to review enforcement boundaries, noting that activities related to pricing and HTA may no longer constitute infringing acts under the revised e…", "What to monitor: Monitor national transposition efforts to identify any residual ambiguities in territorial scope or divergent interpretations of 'tender participation' across Mem…"]
core_points_en: The compromise text expands the Bolar exemption to cover pricing, reimbursement, health technology assessments, and tender participation activities.
Third-party active pharmaceutical ingredient suppliers are now included within the personal scope of the Bolar exemption safe harbor provisions.
Patent linkage is explicitly prohibited in the Pharma Package, aligning with existing EU competition law principles regarding market access.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Generic and biosimilar companies should assess how the expanded scope impacts their pre-launch strategies, particularly regarding tender bids and supplier agreem…
Practice note: Rights holders need to review enforcement boundaries, noting that activities related to pricing and HTA may no longer constitute infringing acts under the revised e…
What to monitor: Monitor national transposition efforts to identify any residual ambiguities in territorial scope or divergent interpretations of 'tender participation' across Mem…

items.title: Law and practice snippets: April 2026
items.title_zh: UKIPO发布数字设计审查新指南并上调官费
items.title_en: UK IPO Raises Fees and Issues New Guidance on Digital Design Registration
items.summary: An update on recent practice points by our Law and Practice Committee, including a new Designs Practice Notice, certificate issuance and tribunal timescales.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）于2026年4月1日实施平均25%的官费上调，商标申请及续展费用均有增加。同时发布DPN 01/26号外观设计实践通知，明确图标、GUI及网页等数字设计的审查标准，特别规范含动画或运动元素的设计视图提交要求，强调单一整体印象及免责声明的作用，旨在提升注册清晰度与确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office implemented an average 25% fee increase effective 1 April 2026, raising online trademark application and renewal costs. Concurrently, the Office published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26, providing updated examination guidance for registered designs covering icons, graphical user interfaces (GUIs), web pages, and digital assets. The notice clarifies requirements for static and animated designs, emphasizing the need for multiple views to demonstrate movement and ensuring a single, unitary overall impression. It also addresses the role of written disclaimers in defining the scope of protection for these digital representations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国需关注GUI及动态外观设计合规成本上升。建议提前优化设计视图布局，利用免责声明规避非保护部分争议，以应对更严格的审查标准。同时需预算调整，评估官费上涨对海外IP组合维护的影响，确保持续竞争力。
items.ai_insight_en: The new DPN 01/26 establishes immediate procedural expectations for protecting digital interface elements in the UK, requiring precise visual disclosures to satisfy the unitary overall impression test. Rights holders managing portfolios of GUIs and animated icons should review existing and pending applications against these clarified examination practices. The concurrent fee adjustment necessitates a review of budget allocations for trademark maintenance and new filings within the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO自2026年4月1日起实施平均25%官费上调，商标在线申请增至205英镑", "发布DPN 01/26指南，细化图标、GUI及含动画数字外观设计的视图提交规范", "强调通过多视图展示静态与动态设计，确保注册体现单一整体印象"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK IPO fees increased by an average of 25% on 1 April 2026, with online trademark filing rising to £205 per class.", "Designs Practice Notice 01/26 clarifies examination standards for GUIs, icons, and animated digital design applications.", "Applicants must use multiple views to clearly show animation or movement, ensuring a single overall impression on the register."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI及动态设计视图，利用免责声明规避审查风险", "评估官费上涨影响，调整英国IP组合维护预算策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Portfolio managers should assess the impact of the 25% fee increase on upcoming trademark renewals and new application budgets.", "Practice note: Ensure digital design submissions include sufficient views to depict animation or movement, complying with DPN 01/26 requirements.", "What to monitor: Observe how the UK IPO applies the new guidelines to borderline cases involving complex animated user interface elements."]
core_points_en: UK IPO fees increased by an average of 25% on 1 April 2026, with online trademark filing rising to £205 per class.
Designs Practice Notice 01/26 clarifies examination standards for GUIs, icons, and animated digital design applications.
Applicants must use multiple views to clearly show animation or movement, ensuring a single overall impression on the register.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Portfolio managers should assess the impact of the 25% fee increase on upcoming trademark renewals and new application budgets.
Practice note: Ensure digital design submissions include sufficient views to depict animation or movement, complying with DPN 01/26 requirements.
What to monitor: Observe how the UK IPO applies the new guidelines to borderline cases involving complex animated user interface elements.

items.title: The UK IPO issues new Designs Practice Notice
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局发布数字外观设计审查新指南
items.title_en: UK IPO Issues New Guidance on Protecting Digital Designs and GUIs
items.summary: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has issued new guidance on protecting digital designs, including graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages and graphic symbols/icons.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UK IPO）发布首份2024年外观设计实践通知（DPN 01/26），旨在澄清图形用户界面、网页及图标等数字外观设计的审查标准。鉴于此类申请量上升，新规强调注册簿需清晰无歧义地展示设计整体印象。指南详细规定了静态与动态设计的提交要求，允许使用最多12个视图展示动画序列，并明确了书面免责声明在界定保护范围时的作用，若解释过于复杂可能引发异议。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has published Designs Practice Notice (DPN) 01/26, providing immediate guidance on registering digital designs such as graphical user interfaces (GUIs), webpages, and icons. This is the first DPN issued since 2024, addressing a rise in applications for these assets. The notice clarifies that the register must clearly show the design's overall impression without ambiguity. It details examination standards for static and moving designs, permitting up to 12 views to depict animation sequences. The guidance also outlines acceptable practices for written disclaimers, emphasizing clarity to avoid objections based on complex interpretation requirements.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业出口英国时，应严格遵循新指南优化GUI及UI设计的外观专利申请策略。建议充分利用12个视图上限完整呈现动态交互效果，确保视觉表达清晰无歧义。同时，谨慎使用免责声明，避免因表述模糊导致审查异议，以保障数字资产在英国市场的知识产权保护强度与稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This practice notice provides essential clarity for rights holders managing portfolios of digital assets in the UK market. By specifying how static and dynamic interfaces should be represented, the UK IPO aims to reduce uncertainty during examination. Practitioners should ensure that visual representations and any accompanying disclaimers align strictly with these new standards to maintain robust protection for GUIs and interactive elements.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UK IPO发布DPN 01/26，明确GUI及数字外观设计的审查原则与整体印象标准", "规范动态设计提交，允许使用最多12个视图清晰展示动画 progression", "确认书面免责声明的效力，但要求清晰易懂，避免过度复杂的解释需求"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["DPN 01/26 establishes key principles for digital design registration, requiring the overall impression to be clear and unambiguous on the register.", "Applicants may use up to 12 views within the online form to accurately represent the progression of animations and moving designs.", "Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear; excessive complexity in interpretation may trigger objections."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优化GUI专利视图提交策略，利用多视图清晰呈现动态交互细节", "审慎使用免责声明，确保界定清晰以避免因解释复杂引发的审查异议"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Clarifies registration standards for digital assets like GUIs and icons, helping companies secure clearer protection for interactive interfaces in the UK.", "Practice note: Utilize the maximum of 12 views to demonstrate animation sequences clearly and ensure disclaimers are straightforward to avoid examination objections.", "What to monitor: Observe how examiners apply the 'overall impression' standard to complex digital designs under this new immediate-effect guidance."]
core_points_en: DPN 01/26 establishes key principles for digital design registration, requiring the overall impression to be clear and unambiguous on the register.
Applicants may use up to 12 views within the online form to accurately represent the progression of animations and moving designs.
Written disclaimers are accepted for defining protection scope but must be clear; excessive complexity in interpretation may trigger objections.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies registration standards for digital assets like GUIs and icons, helping companies secure clearer protection for interactive interfaces in the UK.
Practice note: Utilize the maximum of 12 views to demonstrate animation sequences clearly and ensure disclaimers are straightforward to avoid examination objections.
What to monitor: Observe how examiners apply the 'overall impression' standard to complex digital designs under this new immediate-effect guidance.

items.title: CMS strengthens London IP practice with McCarthy Denning partner
items.title_zh: CMS 吸纳前 McCarthy Denning 合伙人强化伦敦专利业务
items.title_en: CMS Appoints Former McCarthy Denning Partner Tom Carver to London IP Team
items.summary: Tom Carver officially joined CMS Cameron McKenna’s London practice on 20 April as partner. He brings experience in patents, trademarks, and design rights. In addition to law, Carver also holds a degree in genetics from the University of Nottingham. He has been involved in multi-jurisdictional litigation including the UK Supreme Court cases Conor Medsystems vs […] The post CMS strengthens London IP practice with McCarthy Denning partner appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: CMS Cameron McKenna 律所于 4 月 20 日正式任命 Tom Carver 为伦敦办公室合伙人。Carver 拥有遗传学背景，专长涵盖专利、商标及外观设计权。其曾参与包括英国最高法院在内的多法域诉讼，此次加入旨在增强该所在复杂知识产权争议及组合管理方面的服务能力。
items.ai_summary_en: Tom Carver has joined CMS Cameron McKenna's London office as a partner, effective 20 April. He arrives from McCarthy Denning, bringing experience in patents, trademarks, and design rights. Carver holds a degree in genetics from the University of Nottingham and has participated in multi-jurisdictional litigation, including cases before the UK Supreme Court.

items.ai_insight_en: This appointment highlights continued consolidation among leading UK IP practices. For rights holders and corporate counsel, tracking lateral moves of partners with specific technical degrees, such as genetics, helps identify firms with deep sector-specific capabilities for complex patent disputes in the UK jurisdiction.

items.title: Hamburg Local Division clarifies universal jurisdiction under Art. 4 Brussels I Recast
items.title_zh: UPC 汉堡分部澄清布鲁塞尔条例下的普遍管辖权
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg Confirms Universal Jurisdiction Under Brussels I Recast for Non-UPC Acts
items.summary: Dyson v Dreame – Hamburg Local Division, 7 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 汉堡分部在戴森诉追觅案中裁定，对住所地在成员国的被告拥有普遍管辖权，涵盖西班牙等非 UPC 区及英国侵权。但法院限制了共同被告管辖权，认为欧盟授权代表不足以作为锚定被告追究英国分销商责任，最终驳回针对英国的禁令请求。
items.ai_summary_en: In Dyson v Dreame, the UPC Hamburg Local Division granted a preliminary injunction for EP 3 119 235, confirming that the UPC exercises universal jurisdiction under Article 4 of the Brussels I Recast Regulation over defendants domiciled in UPC Member States. This jurisdiction extends to infringements occurring in non-UPC territories, including Spain and the United Kingdom. However, the Court significantly restricted the application of Article 8(1) regarding co-defendants. It ruled that an EU authorized representative could not serve as an anchor defendant for a UK distributor, as the regulatory framework did not establish sufficient foreseeability for joint liability. Consequently, while relief was granted for UPC states and Spain, claims concerning the UK were dismissed.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕 UPC 普遍管辖权带来的跨境诉讼风险，即便在非 UPC 国家也可能被卷入。同时，单纯设立欧盟代表处未必能覆盖英国法律责任，应针对英欧市场分别构建合规与抗辩体系，避免管辖连接点误判。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the extraterritorial reach of the UPC for rights holders seeking pan-European enforcement, particularly against entities with a domicile in a participating Member State. It simultaneously establishes important boundaries for joinder strategies, indicating that mere regulatory compliance roles in the EU do not automatically create jurisdictional links for distinct UK market activities. Parties must carefully structure their European and UK distribution entities to manage litigation exposure and ensure that jurisdictional anchors are legally robust and factually distinct across these markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["确认 UPC 对成员国被告拥有涵盖非 UPC 领土的普遍管辖权", "限制共同被告管辖权，要求侵权行为关联具有合理可预见性", "欧盟授权代表角色不足以构成英国法下的共同侵权或中间人责任"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC qualifies as a court of a Member State, applying Article 4 Brussels I Recast to grant universal jurisdiction over defendants domiciled in Contracting Member States.", "Jurisdiction covers infringement acts in non-UPC territories like Spain and the UK when the defendant is domiciled within the UPC system, treating it as a single territory.", "Article 8(1) co-defendant jurisdiction requires reasonably foreseeable connections; an EU authorized representative cannot anchor claims against a separate UK distributor."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用普遍管辖权规则评估在欧整体诉讼风险敞口", "区分英欧法律主体角色，避免单一架构导致责任落空"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage universal jurisdiction against UPC-domiciled defendants for acts in non-UPC states, expanding enforcement scope beyond the UPCA terri…", "Practice note: When joining co-defendants under Article 8(1), ensure factual connections are reasonably foreseeable; regulatory roles alone may not suffice for cross-border liabil…", "What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretations of 'foreseeability' in co-defendant scenarios, particularly regarding the separation of EU and UK supply chain entities."]
core_points_en: The UPC qualifies as a court of a Member State, applying Article 4 Brussels I Recast to grant universal jurisdiction over defendants domiciled in Contracting Member States.
Jurisdiction covers infringement acts in non-UPC territories like Spain and the UK when the defendant is domiciled within the UPC system, treating it as a single territory.
Article 8(1) co-defendant jurisdiction requires reasonably foreseeable connections; an EU authorized representative cannot anchor claims against a separate UK distributor.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage universal jurisdiction against UPC-domiciled defendants for acts in non-UPC states, expanding enforcement scope beyond the UPCA terri…
Practice note: When joining co-defendants under Article 8(1), ensure factual connections are reasonably foreseeable; regulatory roles alone may not suffice for cross-border liabil…
What to monitor: Future UPC divisions' interpretations of 'foreseeability' in co-defendant scenarios, particularly regarding the separation of EU and UK supply chain entities.

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, April 10, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1110/2025 And UPC_CFI_1111/2025
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院：初审判决被推翻后已付费用可追回
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Costs Paid Under Overturned First-Instance Decision Are Recoverable
items.summary: Costs paid under a first-instance decision are recoverable if that decision is overturned on appeal. The appeal’s outcome invalidates the initial cost order (Rule 151 RoP).
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Seoul Viosys案中裁定，若初审判决在上诉中被推翻，依据程序规则第151条，基于该判决产生的初始费用命令失效，已支付费用可在后续程序中追回。法院明确指出，初审阶段达成的费用协议不自动延伸至上诉阶段，因为上诉成本需单独评估其合理性与比例性。此裁决明确了UPC诉讼中费用承担的法律基础随主判决变动而变动的原则，对当事人管理诉讼预算及风险评估具有重要指导意义。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf ruled that costs paid pursuant to a first-instance decision are recoverable if that decision is subsequently overturned on appeal. The Court held that the reversal of the main judgment removes the legal basis for the initial cost order under Rule 151 of the Rules of Procedure. Consequently, amounts previously paid become subject to recovery in subsequent cost proceedings. Additionally, the Court determined that a cost agreement concluded for the first instance does not automatically extend to the appeal stage. Appeal costs must be assessed separately based on reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 of the UPCA, as the original agreement relied on first-instance estimates where an appeal was not foreseeable.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在参与UPC诉讼时，应严格区分初审与上诉阶段的费用预算，避免默认费用协议覆盖全程。鉴于败诉方可能通过上诉逆转费用责任，企业需动态调整诉讼策略，并在和解谈判中明确费用条款的适用范围，以控制跨境知识产权纠纷的整体财务风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the temporal scope of cost orders and agreements within UPC litigation. Rights holders and defendants should recognize that financial obligations arising from first-instance rulings are contingent on the final outcome of any appeals. Cost settlements or agreements negotiated at the trial level do not inherently cover appellate stages, necessitating distinct budgeting and strategic planning for potential appeals to manage exposure effectively.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["初审判决被上诉推翻后，原费用命令失效，已付费用具备可追回性", "初审费用协议不自动涵盖上诉阶段，上诉费用需单独评估合理性", "法律依据为《统一专利法院协定》第69条及程序规则第151条"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Reversal of a first-instance decision invalidates the initial cost order, making previously paid costs recoverable under Rule 151 RoP.", "A cost agreement for the first instance does not automatically apply to appeal proceedings, which require separate assessment.", "Appeal costs are evaluated independently for reasonableness and proportionality pursuant to Article 69 UPCA."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格区分初审与上诉费用预算，避免协议范围误判", "动态调整策略，关注上诉对费用责任的逆转影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Initial cost payments may be reclaimed if the underlying judgment is reversed, affecting overall litigation financial risk.", "Practice note: Draft cost agreements specifically for the first instance; do not assume they cover subsequent appeal stages.", "What to monitor: How separate assessments of reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 UPCA are applied to appeal costs."]
core_points_en: Reversal of a first-instance decision invalidates the initial cost order, making previously paid costs recoverable under Rule 151 RoP.
A cost agreement for the first instance does not automatically apply to appeal proceedings, which require separate assessment.
Appeal costs are evaluated independently for reasonableness and proportionality pursuant to Article 69 UPCA.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Initial cost payments may be reclaimed if the underlying judgment is reversed, affecting overall litigation financial risk.
Practice note: Draft cost agreements specifically for the first instance; do not assume they cover subsequent appeal stages.
What to monitor: How separate assessments of reasonableness and proportionality under Article 69 UPCA are applied to appeal costs.

items.title: UPC: Revocation of Independent Claims Does Not Invalidate Unchallenged Claims | Emporia v Seoul Viosys | EIP
items.title_zh: UPC：撤销独立权利要求不自动导致未受挑战的从属权利要求无效
items.title_en: UPC: Revocation of Independent Claim Does Not Automatically Invalidate Unchallenged Dependent Claims
items.summary: The UPC Central Division clarifies that revoking an independent patent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims, highlighting important strategic considerations in revocation actions.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 中央分部在 Emporia 诉 Seoul Viosys 案中裁定，撤销专利的独立权利要求并不自动使未受挑战的从属权利要求无效。法院指出，从属权利要求的附加技术特征可能具备独立权利要求所缺乏的新颖性或创造性。即便独立权利要求因增加事项被撤销，专利权人仍可通过修改将从属权利要求提升为独立形式以维持专利部分有效。
items.ai_summary_en: In Emporia UK and Ireland Ltd. v Seoul Viosys Co., Ltd., the UPC Paris Central Division ruled that revoking an independent patent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims. The court rejected a preliminary objection regarding competence, distinguishing the parties from parallel Court of Appeal proceedings where only specific claims were revoked. The Division held that dependent claims contain additional technical features that may independently satisfy novelty and inventive step requirements. Consequently, the invalidation of the sole independent claim did not extend to dependent claims outside the scope of the earlier dispute, allowing the patent to potentially remain valid in part.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the structural independence of patent claims within UPC revocation actions. Rights holders can preserve partial patent validity by relying on the distinct technical contributions of dependent claims, even if the broadest independent claim is invalidated. This underscores the importance of precise claim construction and the strategic management of parallel proceedings across different jurisdictions to avoid unintended collateral effects on unchallenged claim sets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["独立权利要求撤销不自动波及未受挑战的从属权利要求", "从属权利要求的附加特征可单独满足新颖性与创造性要求", "专利权人需主动申请修改以将从属权利要求转为独立形式"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Paris Central Division confirmed that revocation of an independent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims.", "Dependent claims possess additional technical features that may independently meet novelty and inventive step requirements separate from the independent claim.", "A preliminary objection based on parallel national proceedings was rejected because the parties involved were not considered identical under Article 33(4) UPCA."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["独立权利要求失效不等于专利整体无效，需重点防御从属权利要求", "应及时启动权利要求修改程序，将有效从属权利要求升格为独立权利要求"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Patent owners should assess the standalone validity of dependent claims when facing revocation of independent claims to maintain partial protection.", "Practice note: Ensure clear distinction between parties in parallel national and UPC proceedings to manage competence objections and scope of dispute effectively.", "What to monitor: How the UPC applies this principle to auxiliary requests and whether similar logic applies to infringement counterclaims involving partially revoked patents."]
core_points_en: The UPC Paris Central Division confirmed that revocation of an independent claim does not automatically invalidate unchallenged dependent claims.
Dependent claims possess additional technical features that may independently meet novelty and inventive step requirements separate from the independent claim.
A preliminary objection based on parallel national proceedings was rejected because the parties involved were not considered identical under Article 33(4) UPCA.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent owners should assess the standalone validity of dependent claims when facing revocation of independent claims to maintain partial protection.
Practice note: Ensure clear distinction between parties in parallel national and UPC proceedings to manage competence objections and scope of dispute effectively.
What to monitor: How the UPC applies this principle to auxiliary requests and whether similar logic applies to infringement counterclaims involving partially revoked patents.

items.title: Modular IP Education Framework marks three years of growing impact
items.title_zh: EPO模块化IP教育框架实施三年影响显著
items.title_en: EPO Modular IP Education Framework Reaches Three-Year Milestone with Expanded University Network
items.summary: An exchange on insights, best practices and shared values to advance gender parity in innovation
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布其模块化知识产权教育框架（MIPEF）实施三年来成效显著。该框架旨在将IP教育融入STEM学科，已覆盖31个EPC缔约国的100多所大学，惠及6500多名学生并颁发2500多份证书。通过提供结构化、灵活的课程，MIPEF填补了高等教育中技术学科IP教育的空白，助力培养具备专利知识的下一代创新者，促进欧洲创新文化发展。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) reports that its Modular IP Education Framework (MIPEF) has engaged over 6,500 students and issued more than 2,500 certifications since its 2023 launch. The programme now includes over 100 partner universities across 31 European Patent Convention contracting states. MIPEF integrates practical IP training into science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) curricula through ready-to-use courses developed with IP experts. Participants receive EPO certificates and, at the university's discretion, European Credit Transfer and Accumulation System (ECTS) credits. This initiative aims to democratize access to IP knowledge, equipping future inventors and entrepreneurs with essential skills for an innovation-driven economy while modernizing higher education offerings in technical disciplines.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For European and US companies operating in R-intensive sectors, the expansion of MIPEF signals a shift toward early-stage IP literacy among technical talent. As universities increasingly integrate patent rights and IP management into STEM degrees, the baseline competency of new graduates entering the workforce is rising. This trend supports stronger internal IP cultures within organizations and may reduce the initial training burden for in-house counsel and IP teams. Rights holders should recognize this evolving educational landscape as a resource for building long-term innovation capacity and enhancing compliance with European IP standards.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["MIPEF覆盖31国百所高校，认证超2500人，深化STEM领域IP教育", "提供灵活课程填补高校技术学科IP教育空白，无需额外培训结构", "获证学生可得EPO证书及ECTS学分，赋能未来发明人与创业者"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["MIPEF has expanded to over 100 partner universities in 31 EPC contracting states, engaging more than 6,500 students and awarding over 2,500 certifications.", "The framework embeds structured, flexible IP education into STEM disciplines using ready-to-use courses, addressing a critical gap in technical higher education.", "Students completing MIPEF courses receive EPO certificates and potential ECTS credits, fostering a culture of innovation and entrepreneurial awareness across Europe."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["借鉴MIPEF模式强化内部IP培训，提升研发团队专利实务能力", "关注欧洲高校IP教育动态，探索校企合作以获取优质IP人才资源"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor the growing pool of STEM graduates with formal IP training, who may require less foundational instruction on patent basics upon hiring.", "Practice note: Consider collaborating with partner universities or leveraging MIPEF resources to align internal R&D training with emerging academic standards.", "What to monitor: Track the expansion of MIPEF participation rates and course content updates to anticipate shifts in graduate IP competencies across key European markets."]
core_points_en: MIPEF has expanded to over 100 partner universities in 31 EPC contracting states, engaging more than 6,500 students and awarding over 2,500 certifications.
The framework embeds structured, flexible IP education into STEM disciplines using ready-to-use courses, addressing a critical gap in technical higher education.
Students completing MIPEF courses receive EPO certificates and potential ECTS credits, fostering a culture of innovation and entrepreneurial awareness across Europe.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor the growing pool of STEM graduates with formal IP training, who may require less foundational instruction on patent basics upon hiring.
Practice note: Consider collaborating with partner universities or leveraging MIPEF resources to align internal R&D training with emerging academic standards.
What to monitor: Track the expansion of MIPEF participation rates and course content updates to anticipate shifts in graduate IP competencies across key European markets.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-769/22 Commission v Hungary (Values of the European Union)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定匈牙利LGBTI+相关法律违反欧盟法及GDPR
items.title_en: CJEU Rules Hungary Breaches EU Law and GDPR via LGBTI+ Content Restrictions
items.summary: Values of the European Union: by adopting a law which stigmatises and marginalises LGBTI+ persons, Hungary has acted in breach of EU law
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在委员会诉匈牙利案中裁定，匈牙利2021年修订的《儿童保护法》因污名化LGBTI+群体而违反欧盟法。法院首次认定成员国侵犯《欧盟条约》第2条价值观，并指出该法违反内部市场服务自由、《欧盟基本权利宪章》及《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）。判决要求匈牙利停止限制涉及性别认同或同性恋内容的传播，确立了欧盟价值观与数据权利在成员国立法中的优先地位。
items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union ruled in Case C-769/22 that Hungary violated EU law by adopting legislation restricting content related to homosexuality and gender reassignment. The Court found infringements of internal market services rules, the Charter of Fundamental Rights, Article 2 TEU, and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This marks the first time the Court has established an infringement of Article 2 TEU values in an action against a Member State. The judgment underscores the primacy of EU fundamental rights and data protection standards over national legislative measures affecting content access and advertising sectors within the Union.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业需高度关注欧盟“价值观合规”趋势。除传统IP外，广告与内容营销若涉及性别议题，可能触发GDPR及基本权利诉讼风险。建议审查欧洲区内容策略，确保符合反歧视标准，避免因政治正确问题导致服务受限或品牌声誉受损。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment significantly expands the scope of EU value enforcement, linking fundamental rights directly to internal market regulations and data protection compliance. For rights holders and content providers operating in Europe, it signals heightened scrutiny of national laws that may restrict access to information or discriminate based on identity. Companies must ensure their content strategies and data practices align with non-discrimination principles and GDPR requirements to mitigate regulatory risks across member states.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟法院首次认定成员国立法侵犯《欧盟条约》第2条确立的欧盟价值观", "匈牙利法律因限制LGBTI+内容被裁定违反内部市场服务自由及GDPR规定", "判决强调欧盟基本权利宪章对成员国立法具有直接约束力，需保障非歧视原则"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The CJEU found Hungary breached Article 2 TEU for the first time, establishing that national laws stigmatizing LGBTI+ persons violate foundational EU values.", "The contested law restricting content on gender identity and homosexuality was ruled incompatible with internal market service freedoms and the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights.", "The Court determined that Hungary's legislative amendments also constituted violations of the General Data Protection Regulation regarding data processing and privacy rights."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕欧盟以基本权利和GDPR为由的内容监管风险，审查营销素材", "确保在欧洲市场的服务提供符合非歧视原则，避免触犯欧盟价值观底线"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Content providers and advertisers must review compliance with EU non-discrimination standards and GDPR when operating in member states with restrictive content l…", "Practice note: Monitor how Article 2 TEU violations are increasingly cited alongside secondary law breaches in enforcement actions affecting digital services and media.", "What to monitor: Future litigation challenging national measures that restrict access to content or services based on protected characteristics under EU fundamental rights framewo…"]
core_points_en: The CJEU found Hungary breached Article 2 TEU for the first time, establishing that national laws stigmatizing LGBTI+ persons violate foundational EU values.
The contested law restricting content on gender identity and homosexuality was ruled incompatible with internal market service freedoms and the EU Charter of Fundamental Rights.
The Court determined that Hungary's legislative amendments also constituted violations of the General Data Protection Regulation regarding data processing and privacy rights.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Content providers and advertisers must review compliance with EU non-discrimination standards and GDPR when operating in member states with restrictive content l…
Practice note: Monitor how Article 2 TEU violations are increasingly cited alongside secondary law breaches in enforcement actions affecting digital services and media.
What to monitor: Future litigation challenging national measures that restrict access to content or services based on protected characteristics under EU fundamental rights framewo…
